de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.prooftree

Class GUIAbstractTreeNode

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.prooftree.GUIAbstractTreeNode
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    TreeNode
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    GUIBranchNode, GUIOneStepChildTreeNode, GUIProofTreeNode

extends Object
implements TreeNode
